title: Golem Status (PR-topology cache)
description: Cache file for PR-per-golem dispatch, written to .worktrees/.status/{golem}.json. CACHE ONLY — PR/MR state and issue status labels are authoritative; the orchestrate-monitor harness's PR_STATUS supersedes any stale field here. Sibling to agent-status.schema.json (still used by the opt-in local-merge path).

golem.description: Golem identifier (e.g., 'agent01' for a container golem, or a worktree label).

kind.description: How the golem process is realized (Mode 2 worktree or Mode 3 container).

container.description: Docker container name for container golems (e.g., 'project-agent01-1').

branch.description: Git head branch the golem works on (one issue → one branch).

pr.description: PR/MR number once opened; absent until the golem creates the PR.

state.description: Lifecycle state of the golem (cache estimate; PR/label state wins).

ci.description: Cached CI/checks rollup for the PR.

review.description: Cached latest review decision on the PR.

label_state.description: Cached issue status/* label (authoritative value lives on the issue).

blocking.description: Whether the PR needs human action (red CI, changes-requested, or conflicts).

commits.description: Number of commits on the branch.

started.description: ISO datetime when the golem started this issue.

last_activity.description: ISO datetime of the last status update.

checkpoint.description: Golem's last checkpoint from the next-issue pipeline state.
